section_name: Obedience to police officers and flagpersons
article_title: Obedience to & Effect of Traffic Laws
text: No person shall fail or refuse to comply with any lawful order or direction of any police officer or flagperson or other person duly empowered to regulate traffic.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 23. Obedience to & Effect of Traffic Laws
##### § 1102 — Obedience to police officers and flagpersons

No person shall fail or refuse to comply with any lawful order or direction of any police officer or flagperson or other person duly empowered to regulate traffic.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: No person shall fail or refuse to comply with any lawful order or direction of any police officer or flagperson or other person duly empowered to regulate traffic.
